subject: New CUDAвАѓ13.2 Update Released
body:
Access the latest CUDAвАѓ13пїњ.2 release notes and upgrade detailsпїњ.
[ NVIDIA ] https://go.nvidianews.com/MTU2LU9GTi03NDIAAAGgc5wButhtYuoWN468e31S1OuHLOZBf1xrOemXSAKsziQlmVtlpuqvPCIB5WF1ddXANXIOt5g=
CUDAвАѓ13.2 Release Notification
The NVIDIAвАѓCUDAвАѓ13.2 release is now available, featuring important platform updates, language features, and tooling support.¬† 
Please review the details below to ensure your development environment and workflows remain up to date. 
Added New Features in Release 13.2 
 	- CUDA Tile support for compute capability 8.X (Ampere and Ada) GPU architectures. 	- Unified CUDA Toolkit for Arm targets. 	- Support for recursive functions and closures in cuTile Python. 	- Support for emulated FP64 in math libraries 	- Numba-CUDA debugging to developer tools. 	- CUDA Graphs to cuda.core.
Read Release Notes https://go.nvidianews.com/MTU2LU9GTi03NDIAAAGgc5wBuhMWgpiTgVYoUNiSUuJO91k_lwgkOkOn6D56R7yuMteJNvT_DPws9-ZaZRuOH3EypRQ=
